name: Hollywood Hash
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Spaghetti or very thin noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice and cook bacon for about 1 minute per slice on high heat. Remove from drippings.
2. Dice and sauté onion in bacon drippings for about 2 minutes on high heat.
3. Cook hamburger in a covered large mixing bowl for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, on high heat.
4. Cook noodles on high heat, uncovered, until tender (about 8 minutes). Use a measuring cup with 2 cups water and drain.
5. Mix together all ingredients. Heat for 10 minutes or to serving temperature. Serves 12-14. May be frozen. If prepared to serve 4, divide into 3 casserole dishes, cover, freeze, defrost, and reheat as above.
